prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "单腿仰卧抬髋" (alternating single-leg hip lift) exercise, three-quarter view from above and side. Person posture: Athletic person performing an alternating single-leg supine hip lift: lying supine on the floor with upper back, head, neck, shoulders, and arms flat on the ground, arms relaxed at sides palms down; both knees bent at 90 degrees with feet flat on the ground hip-width apart at the start; right leg lifted off the ground with the right knee still bent at 90 degrees (right foot off the ground); left foot remains flat on the ground (this is the supporting leg); hips lifted upward so that left thigh, hips, and shoulders form one straight diagonal line (about 30 degrees from the floor); plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: gluteus maximus and hamstring group of the supporting (left) leg. Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: core muscles and gluteus medius of the supporting hip. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "臀大肌" pointing to the gluteus maximus of the supporting leg; "腘绳肌" pointing to the hamstring group; "核心 / 臀中肌" pointing to the core and gluteus medius area. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
